word: H7590 - שָׁאט - shâʼṭ - shawt - That despise

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁאט

Transliteration: shâ'ṭ

Phonetic: shawt

BDB Definition:

  1. to treat with contempt or despite
    1. (Qal)
      1. to treat with contempt or despite
      2. haters (participle)

Origin: for active part of H7750 [compare H7589]

TWOT entry: 2345

Part(s) of speech: Verb
